prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `d753a70b`.
codex_response:
Implemented `d753a70b` as a color-dependent diamond-outline task: color `2` contracts by one Manhattan layer, color `5` expands by one, and colors like `8`/`9` stay unchanged. The Sonnet hint was discarded and the Opus hint was only partially used; both were wrong about symmetry restoration / same-shape recentering, so I documented the corrected rule and the official bottom-border `5` edge case in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d753a70b/notes.md#L1). No new `arc2/dsl_ext.py` primitive was needed.

Verification passed end to end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and I visually checked the generated sheet against the originals. The main implementation is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d753a70b/verifier.py#L6), [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d753a70b/helpers.py#L10), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d753a70b/generator.py#L137), and [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_d753a70b/__init__.py).
